title: DBRX: A New Standard for Open LLMs
description: Databricks released DBRX, a 132B parameter Mixture of Experts (MoE) model with 36B active parameters. It outperformed GPT-3.5, Mixtral, and Grok-1 on standard benchmarks. DBRX used a 16-expert architecture with 4 active experts per token, achieving inference speed comparable to smaller dense models. Released as open-source under permissive license.
